beats.title: Bolt-Hole and Shades
beats.boundaryReason: The session opens with the party reorienting under the manor, exploring the hidden bolt-hole and dark cavern, and planning how to get past the shades before the distraction plan begins.
dateEvidence: u0675-u0684 later says the group descended in the mid-morning and that it is about 1:30 after the short rest.

beats.title: Shade Ambush
beats.boundaryReason: The party turns the light-object idea into a distraction, descends into the cavern, fights the shades and shadows, searches the burned remains, and completes a short rest before returning to the door.
dateEvidence: The beat continues directly from the opening exploration on 1748-10-18.
u0558-u0560 move the group back to the cavern door after the short rest.

beats.title: Guard Bluff
beats.boundaryReason: The party opens the strange door, scouts the worked caverns, encounters the human guard, and survives Gaudin's deception and the steampup's brush with petrification before the guard walks away.
dateEvidence: The beat follows the short rest on 1748-10-18.
u0675-u0684 place the action around 1:30 in the afternoon.

beats.title: Luring the Bruiser
beats.boundaryReason: The party searches the guard's crates, tries to lure Grimstone with a basilisk emergency, pivots when the guard returns, and ambushes him after a failed second bluff.
dateEvidence: This beat continues the afternoon sequence established at u0675-u0684.
u1255-u1263 close the scene with the party back at the crossroads and taking a washroom break before planning the lab attack.

beats.title: Planning the Lab Assault
beats.boundaryReason: After the break, the party decides how to confront Grimstone, sends invisible Loria ahead, and reaches initiative as Grimstone notices the intrusion.
dateEvidence: This follows immediately after the afternoon guard ambush and washroom break.
u1407-u1417 are the initiative setup before the first combat action begins.

beats.title: Grimstone and Stone Swarm
beats.boundaryReason: The Grimstone fight plays out, including potion grenades, stone spiders, a stone wasp, Acescale's petrification scare, Loria killing Grimstone, and the final smashed constructs.
dateEvidence: The beat begins with the combat already in initiative after u1407-u1417.
u1850 ends the fight by resolving the remaining damage against the last stone spiders.

beats.title: Laboratory Spoils
beats.boundaryReason: With Grimstone defeated, the party searches the alchemical lab and side rooms, identifies potions and treasure, finds Pikeia and the chests, and backs away from the mimic.
dateEvidence: The beat starts immediately after the Grimstone combat on 1748-10-18.
u1955 explicitly places the search at about 2 in the afternoon.

beats.title: Escape and Epilogues
beats.boundaryReason: A day-transition montage carries the party through rest, early-morning escape from the manor, road farewells, and character epilogues.
dateEvidence: u1960-u1965 discuss resting until the early morning before leaving.
u2115-u2118 says the party rests, recovers, and finds itself early in the morning creeping out before anyone is awake.
